Please note: You must register for each event separately. Adding an event to your schedule does not register you. All registrations are reviewed and approved by the individual event host.

EVENTS

May 27

9:00 AM

Toronto Tech Week 2026: Homecoming

Homecoming is the official main stage of Toronto Tech Week 2026, returning for its 2nd annual year to unite over 1,000 of Canada’s top builders globally. ​Hosted at History, a new state-of-the-art live experience venue in the east end of Toronto, Homecoming anchors the week’s citywide celebration of Canadian technology with conversations and connections featuring the best in the business.

REGISTER
Sunday, May 24
7:00 AM - 7:00 PM

Bike from Toronto to Kolbe 15

Part of the Kolbe 15 Rain or Shine series. A ride that earns its finish line. ​For those who know resilience is not built in a boardroom. ​Before we spend a week indoors, this is how we kick off Tech Week. Sunday, May 24
8:30 AM - 10:00 AM

5K Run + Coffee in matched small groups by LYTT

Heads up: this isn't a typical event. Tell us what you're working on and who you want to meet during tech week. We'll match you into a small group of 6 to 8 for a morning 5K, then coffee. Different groups, matched on what you actually want out of this week. Hosted by LYTT.
